temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A woman with long black hair, wearing a purple robe over a turtleneck, screams in terror. Her face is contorted in a grimace as she clutches a small knife. She is pressed against a dirty, stained white wall, her body trembling in fear. (Storyline: This opening shot immediately establishes a high-stakes, terrifying situation, introducing a character in extreme peril.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Screaming, terrified. 2) Background sounds or music: A loud, jarring sound effect accompanies the initial scream, followed by the sound of a door slamming shut.)
(00:04-00:07) The woman's scream intensifies as she is violently struck by an unseen assailant. The force of the blow sends her flying backward, and she slumps against the wall, still clutching the knife. The scene is chaotic and violent. (Storyline: The scene escalates from a moment of terror to one of brutal violence, confirming the woman is being physically attacked.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Screaming in pain and terror. 2) Background sounds or music: Loud, impactful sound effects of a physical struggle and a body hitting the wall are heard.)
